default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Abnormal Security and GrowthX to discuss content analytics, migration updates, and AI-driven content enhancements.](https://fathom.video/share/6iqhZXZXC1b3maZiL6K6ySxXKc8FQUXT?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New Looker Studio Dashboard created for blog performance tracking, with plans to segment GrowthX content specifically](https://fathom.video/share/6iqhZXZXC1b3maZiL6K6ySxXKc8FQUXT?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
  - [Website migration went smoothly with minor issues; traffic may dip temporarily but should recover in 4-6 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/6iqhZXZXC1b3maZiL6K6ySxXKc8FQUXT?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)
  - [AI-driven image and infographic generation in development, aiming to enhance content visuals across articles](https://fathom.video/share/6iqhZXZXC1b3maZiL6K6ySxXKc8FQUXT?tab=summary&timestamp=725.0)
  - [Content production ramping up to 10-15 pieces/week, blending glossary refreshes, new glossary articles, and blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/6iqhZXZXC1b3maZiL6K6ySxXKc8FQUXT?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)

## Topics

### Analytics Dashboard Development

  - [Sydney built a Looker Studio Dashboard for overall blog performance](https://fathom.video/share/6iqhZXZXC1b3maZiL6K6ySxXKc8FQUXT?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
  - [Dashboard includes impressions, clicks, CTR, position, and will incorporate conversions](https://fathom.video/share/6iqhZXZXC1b3maZiL6K6ySxXKc8FQUXT?tab=summary&timestamp=237.0)
  - [Currently showing all blog articles; will be segmented for GrowthX content specifically](https://fathom.video/share/6iqhZXZXC1b3maZiL6K6ySxXKc8FQUXT?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)
  - [Sample report demonstrated granular metrics like week-over-week improvements and per-article performance](https://fathom.video/share/6iqhZXZXC1b3maZiL6K6ySxXKc8FQUXT?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
  - [Conversion tracking to be implemented; team discussing best approach (GA events vs. HubSpot/Amplitude)](https://fathom.video/share/6iqhZXZXC1b3maZiL6K6ySxXKc8FQUXT?tab=summary&timestamp=335.0)

### Content Production and Performance

  - [One GrowthX-produced article ranking so far (take-butching), with 1.5% CTR after 3 days](https://fathom.video/share/6iqhZXZXC1b3maZiL6K6ySxXKc8FQUXT?tab=summary&timestamp=503.0)
  - [Production goal: 10-15 pieces/week, mixing glossary refreshes, new glossary articles, and blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/6iqhZXZXC1b3maZiL6K6ySxXKc8FQUXT?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
  - [5-7 articles published so far, with more in the pipeline for quick turnaround](https://fathom.video/share/6iqhZXZXC1b3maZiL6K6ySxXKc8FQUXT?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)

### Website Migration Review

  - [Migration executed well, with some metrics showing improvement (e.g., site load speed)](https://fathom.video/share/6iqhZXZXC1b3maZiL6K6ySxXKc8FQUXT?tab=summary&timestamp=637.0)
  - [Minor issues identified, main concern being canonical tags (team already addressing)](https://fathom.video/share/6iqhZXZXC1b3maZiL6K6ySxXKc8FQUXT?tab=summary&timestamp=648.0)
  - [Potential temporary traffic dip expected, with full recovery anticipated in 4-6 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/6iqhZXZXC1b3maZiL6K6ySxXKc8FQUXT?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)

### AI-Driven Content Enhancement

  - [Developing capability to generate images and infographics for blog/content](https://fathom.video/share/6iqhZXZXC1b3maZiL6K6ySxXKc8FQUXT?tab=summary&timestamp=725.0)
  - [Current approach: generating configuration for image assembly rather than pixel-by-pixel generation](https://fathom.video/share/6iqhZXZXC1b3maZiL6K6ySxXKc8FQUXT?tab=summary&timestamp=947.0)
  - [Demo showed workflow for creating relevant images and text layouts based on article topics](https://fathom.video/share/6iqhZXZXC1b3maZiL6K6ySxXKc8FQUXT?tab=summary&timestamp=935.0)
  - [Plans to incorporate Abnormal's brand guidelines into the generation process](https://fathom.video/share/6iqhZXZXC1b3maZiL6K6ySxXKc8FQUXT?tab=summary&timestamp=1041.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Emily to publish glossary refreshes and update Airtable accordingly](https://fathom.video/share/6iqhZXZXC1b3maZiL6K6ySxXKc8FQUXT?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Emily to send updated brand style guide to Sydney for AI image generation](https://fathom.video/share/6iqhZXZXC1b3maZiL6K6ySxXKc8FQUXT?tab=summary&timestamp=1046.0)
  - [Abdallah to check with dev team regarding key events for conversion tracking](https://fathom.video/share/6iqhZXZXC1b3maZiL6K6ySxXKc8FQUXT?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)
  - [Jason to finalize and implement AI-driven image/infographic generation](https://fathom.video/share/6iqhZXZXC1b3maZiL6K6ySxXKc8FQUXT?tab=summary&timestamp=725.0)
  - [Team to continue ramping up content production and monitor performance via new dashboard](https://fathom.video/share/6iqhZXZXC1b3maZiL6K6ySxXKc8FQUXT?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)

action_items.description: Share Google sheet detailing migration issues w/ team
Send updated brand style guide to Sydney/Jason for AI image gen
Check w/ dev team re key events for tracking in GA/HubSpot, report back
